creative.concept: Milestone card + privacy carousel: celebrate 100 downloads with a big-number stat card, pivot to the 'your voice just left your Mac' angle as a 6-slide carousel. One channel hook, one trust argument — built around visuals first.

cards.title: 3-step how-it-works
cards.use: Attach to the LinkedIn or X milestone post; also strong as a standalone IG static post for first-time audiences who have no idea what Jot does.

cards.title: 100 downloads milestone stat
cards.use: Primary visual for today's LinkedIn and X milestone posts. The big 100 stops the scroll; the $0 line is the punchline.

storyboard.title: Jot in 15 seconds — hotkey to text
storyboard.use: Instagram Reel / X video / GIF; universal intro clip that works on every channel

shots.visual: Cursor blinking in a Notes document — empty line, waiting
Hand presses ⌥ Space; the pill appears under the Mac notch
User speaks; pill shows a pulsing audio waveform
Pill vanishes; text appears at the cursor in Notes

drafts.text:
Jot just crossed 100 downloads.

No paid ads. No App Store listing. No press. 58 days from v1.0.

It's a free, open-source dictation app for Mac: press a hotkey, speak, transcript lands at your cursor — all on the Neural Engine, nothing leaves the device.

100 people found it on their own. That number should scare me toward doing real marketing. Does organic-only scale past 1000?

#indiedev #macOS #buildinpublic
drafts.note: Attach milestone-stat.svg (export as PNG). Do NOT put the link in the post body — LinkedIn downranks posts with external links. Paste the utm_url as the FIRST COMMENT immediately after posting.

drafts.text:
100 downloads. No ads. No App Store. No press. 58 days.

Jot: press a hotkey, speak, text at cursor. Free. On-device. Open source.
drafts.note: Attach milestone-stat.svg (export as PNG). No link in post body — post the utm_url as the first reply immediately after posting.

drafts.text:
Hit 100 downloads on my free on-device Mac dictation app — no ads, no App Store, no press

Built Jot because I got frustrated with the cost of Mac dictation apps. Core idea: press a hotkey, speak, transcript pastes at cursor in whatever app you're using — no window switching, no copy-paste.

Key design choice: transcription runs entirely on-device on Apple Silicon's Neural Engine (Parakeet TDT model). No audio leaves the Mac, works offline, no API key needed.

There's optional AI cleanup via Apple Intelligence (on-device, macOS 26+), Ollama, or cloud providers if you want it. And a voice-instructed rewrite mode: select text, press a hotkey, speak an instruction — "make this shorter" or "translate to Spanish" — Jot rewrites in place.

Just crossed 100 total downloads. Feels slow, but: entirely organic discovery so far. No ads, no press placement.

Apple Silicon only, macOS 14+. Free, open source.

(I built this — disclosure)

Link in comments.
drafts.note: Post to r/productivity (rotating: r/macapps Jun 11, r/MacOS Jun 12, r/productivity today). Replace 'Link in comments' with the actual utm_url as the first comment. recommended:false — last recommended:true reddit post was June 11 (2 days ago); needs 4+ days — earliest is June 15. Answer every comment in the first hour.

drafts.text:
Cloud dictation sends your voice to remote servers. Jot doesn't.

Transcription runs on your Mac's Neural Engine. Nothing leaves. No subscription. Free, forever.

Link in bio.

#macos #privacy #dictation #voicetotext #opensource #macapps #productivity #indiedev
drafts.visual: Today's carousel: slide-1.svg through slide-6.svg. Export each slide as a 1080×1350 PNG. Post as a multi-image carousel on Instagram. Caption pairs with slide-1 (the hook). UTM link goes in your bio.
drafts.note: recommended:false — last recommended instagram post was June 11 (2 days ago); needs 3+ days — earliest is June 14. Caption links aren't clickable on Instagram — keep the utm_url (utm_source=instagram) in your bio permanently.

notes: Downloads hit 119 (+20 from June 12's 99), passing the 100-milestone for the first time; 7-day avg is now 11/day. The spike from yesterday's 2/day baseline is notable — possibly a delayed effect of the June 12 MacMenuBar.com submission or 9to5Mac tip, or organic discovery via a Reddit thread not visible in today's searches. Superwhisper's lifetime plan was raised 240% to $849 in 2026 (per search results) — the strongest pricing contrast angle Jot has right now, woven into slide-4 of today's carousel. Jot still absent from all Mac dictation roundup articles surfaced by web search (machow2.com, heymumble.com, setapp.com, aidictation.com, lumevoice.com); these are SEO channels that will pay off with 1–2 press mentions. AlternativeTo.net appeared prominently in searches for 'free macOS dictation alternatives' — if Jot isn't listed there yet, a free submission would put it in front of active comparison shoppers with no effort. No outreach today (last outreach was June 12, within the 7-day window). No high-quality Reddit/HN reply opportunities surfaced in today's searches.
